function_v0.doc:
Construct.

Note: `__constructor` (no double-underscore in Soroban 22) runs
automatically at deploy. We store the immutable display/metadata
fields here. The `minter` is set in a follow-up call from the
Factory (or YieldStripping) via [`Self::initialize_minter`].
function_v0.name: __constructor

function_v0.doc:
Set the minter exactly once. The factory calls this immediately
after deployment with the address of the parent `YieldStripping`
contract. Subsequent calls revert with `AlreadyInitialized`.

No `require_auth` here \xe2\x80\x94 calling this address is the bootstrap
privilege. In production deployments the factory wraps the entire
deploy + init pair in one transaction so no other principal can
race the call.
function_v0.name: initialize_minter

function_v0.doc: The minter address, or panics if not yet initialized.
function_v0.name: minter

function_v0.doc: Mint `amount` PT to `to`. Callable only by the configured minter.
function_v0.name: mint

function_v0.doc: Burn `amount` PT from `from`. Callable only by the configured\nminter; bypasses allowance because the minter is the protocol.
function_v0.name: burn

udt_error_enum_v0.doc:
Errors that any Strate contract can return.

Discriminant policy: append-only. Numbers are reserved in ranges:

- `1..20`  math
- `20..40` access control / lifecycle
- `40..60` maturity / state machine
- `60..80` AMM / liquidity
- `80..100` oracle / pricing
- `100..120` token / balance / input validation
udt_error_enum_v0.name: Error

cases.doc: Generic math failure (should rarely surface; specific variants\nbelow are preferred).
cases.name: Math

cases.doc: 256-bit intermediate overflowed.
cases.name: MathOverflow

cases.doc: Result is below the representable range.
cases.name: MathUnderflow

cases.doc: Division by zero.
cases.name: DivisionByZero

cases.doc: `ln` called with `x <= 0`.
cases.name: LnOfNegative

cases.doc: Caller lacks the required role / capability.
cases.name: Unauthorized

cases.doc: Contract is paused.
cases.name: Paused

cases.doc: Contract is already initialized.
cases.name: AlreadyInitialized

cases.doc: Contract has not been initialized.
cases.name: NotInitialized

cases.doc: Operation requires maturity to have passed.
cases.name: MaturityNotReached

cases.doc: Operation requires the market to still be pre-maturity.
cases.name: MaturityReached

cases.doc: Liquidity actions are disabled inside the no-trade window\npreceding maturity (anti-asymptote guard for the AMM).
cases.name: MarketLockedNearMaturity

cases.doc: Maturity supplied at construction is invalid (in the past or\noutside the configured policy window).
cases.name: InvalidMaturity

cases.doc: Not enough liquidity in the pool to satisfy this trade.
cases.name: InsufficientLiquidity

cases.doc: Quoted output is below the caller's minimum tolerance.
cases.name: SlippageExceeded

cases.doc: Deposit is below the per-market minimum.
cases.name: MinDepositNotMet

cases.doc: Oracle observation is older than the staleness threshold.
cases.name: OracleStale

cases.doc: Oracle observation is implausible (sanity checks rejected it).
cases.name: OracleRejected

cases.doc: Caller's balance is below the requested amount.
cases.name: InsufficientBalance

cases.doc: Underlying asset is not one the protocol supports for this\nfactory.
cases.name: InvalidUnderlying

cases.doc: Mint would push `TotalUnderlying` past the market's `tvl_cap`.\nReturned by YS::mint; introduced for the unaudited mainnet\nlaunch where every market ships with a hard cap.
cases.name: TvlCapExceeded

fields.doc: Yield index at mint (the "ghost" snapshot the YT inherits).
fields.name: index_at_mint

fields.doc: PT minted (== YT minted at mint time).
fields.name: pt_out

fields.doc: Underlying amount deposited.
fields.name: underlying_in

fields.doc: User receiving PT + YT.
fields.name: user

fields.doc: YT minted.
fields.name: yt_out

udt_struct_v0.doc:
`(TOPIC_REDEEM, user)` indexed; `data = RedeemEvent`.

`redeem_kind` distinguishes the two paths:
- `0`: pre-maturity redeem of PT+YT pair (one-for-one).
- `1`: post-maturity redeem of PT alone.
udt_struct_v0.name: RedeemEvent

fields.doc: PT burned.
fields.name: pt_burned

fields.doc: `0` = pre-maturity pair redeem, `1` = post-maturity PT redeem.
fields.name: redeem_kind

fields.doc: Underlying returned.
fields.name: underlying_out

fields.doc: User redeeming.
fields.name: user

fields.doc: YT burned (zero on the post-maturity path).
fields.name: yt_burned

fields.doc: YT holder claiming.
fields.name: user

fields.doc: User's local yield index snapshot **after** the claim\n(== global index at claim time).
fields.name: user_index_after

fields.doc: User's local yield index snapshot **before** the claim.
fields.name: user_index_before

fields.doc: Underlying paid out as yield.
fields.name: yield_amount

udt_struct_v0.doc:
`(TOPIC_INDEX,)` (single-tag, no indexed key); `data = IndexSyncEvent`.

Emitted whenever the global yield index is rolled forward. This
gives indexers a complete monotonic timeline of the index without
needing to reconstruct it from mint / claim flows.
udt_struct_v0.name: IndexSyncEvent

fields.doc: Ledger timestamp at sync (seconds since epoch).
fields.name: at_timestamp

fields.doc: Global index after sync, in WAD.
fields.name: new_index

fields.doc: Previous index, in WAD.
fields.name: old_index

fields.doc: Fee paid in SY (already deducted from `sy_delta`).
fields.name: fee_sy

fields.doc: Implied rate (WAD-scaled) **after** the swap.
fields.name: implied_rate_after

fields.doc: PT delta from the trader's perspective. Positive = trader\nreceived PT, negative = trader spent PT.
fields.name: pt_delta

fields.doc: SY delta from the trader's perspective.
fields.name: sy_delta

fields.doc: Trader.
fields.name: trader

udt_struct_v0.doc:
`(TOPIC_LIQ, provider)` indexed; `data = LiquidityEvent`.

`op` distinguishes:
- `0`: add (mint LP).
- `1`: remove (burn LP).
udt_struct_v0.name: LiquidityEvent

fields.doc: LP tokens minted (`op=0`) or burned (`op=1`).
fields.name: lp_delta

fields.doc: `0` = add, `1` = remove.
fields.name: op

fields.doc: LP provider.
fields.name: provider

fields.doc: PT contributed (positive on add, negative on remove).
fields.name: pt_delta

fields.doc: SY contributed (positive on add, negative on remove).
fields.name: sy_delta

udt_struct_v0.doc: `(TOPIC_OBS,)` (single-tag); `data = ObservationEvent`.\n\nEmitted whenever the oracle ring buffer accepts a new observation.
udt_struct_v0.name: ObservationEvent

fields.doc: Ledger timestamp of this observation (seconds since epoch).
fields.name: at_timestamp

fields.doc: Implied rate captured, WAD-scaled.
fields.name: implied_rate

fields.doc: Index in the ring buffer that was written.
fields.name: slot

udt_struct_v0.doc: Constructor args for the Principal Token contract.
udt_struct_v0.name: PtInitArgs

fields.doc: Token decimals. Must match the underlying's decimals so 1 PT\nredeems 1 underlying at maturity with no scale conversion.
fields.name: decimals

fields.doc: Maturity timestamp (Unix seconds).
fields.name: maturity

fields.doc: Token name, e.g. `"PT-bUSDC-DEC2026"`.
fields.name: name

fields.doc: Symbol, e.g. `"PT-bUSDC"`.
fields.name: symbol

fields.doc: Display handle for the underlying asset (not called into).
fields.name: underlying

udt_struct_v0.doc: Constructor args for the Yield Token contract.
udt_struct_v0.name: YtInitArgs

udt_struct_v0.doc: Constructor args for the Oracle contract.
udt_struct_v0.name: OracleConfig

fields.doc: Address of the Blend lending pool we read `b_rate` from.
fields.name: blend_pool

fields.doc: Maximum allowed relative jump per `sync_rate`, in WAD.\n`5e16` == 5%. A rate moving more than this freezes the oracle.
fields.name: max_delta_per_sync_wad

fields.doc: Maximum age (in ledger units) of `CachedRate` before reads revert.\nAt 5s/ledger, 120 ledgers \xe2\x89\x88 10 minutes.
fields.name: max_staleness_ledgers

fields.doc: Size of the TWAP ring buffer. Bounded so it always fits in\ninstance budget. Values < 2 are rejected at construction.
fields.name: observation_window

udt_struct_v0.doc: Constructor args for the YieldStripping contract. Named `YsConfig`\nin this crate to avoid colliding with the generic name `Config` when\nother crates re-export it.
udt_struct_v0.name: YsConfig

fields.doc: Admin address \xe2\x80\x94 single role: pause/unpause.
fields.name: admin

fields.doc: AMM curve parameter, immutable per market. YS doesn't use this\ndirectly; recorded for discoverability so external callers can\nread the market's curve scaling from a single contract.
fields.name: scalar_root

fields.doc:
Hard cap on total underlying deposited into this market, in
underlying-token base units (7 decimals on Stellar for SAC).

Immutable per market. Enforced on every `mint`. A value of `0`
means "no cap" \xe2\x80\x94 only safe post-audit; until then every mainnet
deploy MUST set this to a real number.
fields.name: tvl_cap

udt_struct_v0.doc: Oracle configuration passed through `Factory::deploy_market` to\n`Oracle::__constructor`. Same field set as [`OracleConfig`] minus the\n`blend_pool` which the factory provides separately at deploy time.
udt_struct_v0.name: OracleParams

udt_struct_v0.doc:
PT + YT cosmetic metadata passed through `Factory::deploy_market`. The
token decimals must match the underlying asset; PT and YT share the
value intentionally so 1 PT + 1 YT redeems 1 U at maturity with no
scale conversion.
udt_struct_v0.name: TokenMetadata
